name: No-Fat Italian Dressing (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Allow the dressing to chill for at least an hour or two to allow the herbs to blend together.
4. Before serving, remove the garlic pieces from the mixture.
5. The recipe yields 12 tablespoons of dressing.
